summary.original: Guidance for distinctive, intentional visual design when building new UI or reshaping an existing one. Helps with aesthetic direction, typography, and making choices that don't read as templated defaults.
summary.zhCN: 为新建或重塑 UI 提供鲜明而有意图的视觉设计指导，帮助确定美学方向、字体、布局与文案，避免模板化默认方案。

description.original: Guidance for distinctive, intentional visual design when building new UI or reshaping an existing one. Helps with aesthetic direction, typography, and making choices that don't read as templated defaults. Official skill document adapted by Agent-OPT as a dedicated bilingual Web skill studio with section navigation, full-text search, and sandboxed source rendering. No upstream executable scripts are executed.
description.zhCN: 为新建或重塑 UI 提供鲜明而有意图的视觉设计指导，帮助确定美学方向、字体、布局与文案，避免模板化默认方案。Agent-OPT 将固定版本的官方 SKILL.md 及完整简体中文译文适配为专属 Web 技能工作室，支持任务执行手册、章节导航、全文检索和沙箱化只读渲染；不执行上游脚本，也不访问外部账号。

evidence.note: Pinned path-addressed SKILL.md from the official repository snapshot with content SHA decdff43d05908b4c1fc2cfd2d80fc5743440934.
License evidence from the official repository path for this skill or its parent plugin manifest.

license.evidence: Primary-source license identifier Apache-2.0 recorded from skills/frontend-design/LICENSE.txt. Agent-OPT stores a local review copy of SKILL.md for Web rendering and does not execute upstream scripts.

name.zhCN: 准备任务专属 Agent 执行手册

description.original: Rank the pinned skill sections against a bounded user objective and context, then produce an agent prompt, checklist, or reference pack without executing upstream scripts.
description.zhCN: 根据有界的用户目标和上下文，对固定版本技能的各章节进行相关性排序，然后在不执行上游脚本的前提下生成 Agent 提示词、检查清单或参考资料包。

description.original: Open the full official skill document with structured sections.
description.zhCN: 以结构化章节打开完整官方技能文档。

description.original: Keyword search across the skill body with line-level excerpts.
description.zhCN: 在技能正文中做关键词检索并返回行级摘录。

description.original: Jump between markdown headings and inspect one section at a time.
description.zhCN: 在 Markdown 标题之间跳转，并按章节查看内容。

description.original: List and safely preview text references, scripts, templates, and licenses captured from the exact upstream commit and recorded in BUNDLE.json.

notes: The in-process adapter reads only the curated original/Chinese bodies and BUNDLE.json-listed supporting files under this skill directory.
Supporting paths must match the fixed hash manifest; traversal, unknown files, symlinks, binary previews, and files above 400KB are rejected.
Upstream scripts and external services are not executed by this Web adaptation.
Selected in the quality-first priority tranche with exact official source and license provenance.
Complete Simplified Chinese body preserves frontmatter, heading hierarchy, code, inline tokens, links, and URLs; validation is automated.
The dedicated profile configures task examples, labels, context, output artifact, bilingual source, and pinned resource workflow for this skill.
Lifecycle is web-ready; verified remains reserved for a passing real Chromium report and any separately executable upstream workflow evidence.
Complete Simplified Chinese translation: catalog/skill-bodies/skill-frontend-design/SKILL.zh-CN.md; the original SKILL.md remains unchanged.
Frontmatter keys, fenced code blocks, commands, paths, links, and technical identifiers were preserved during review.

features: 前端视觉设计任务 with two skill-specific task examples
产品、受众与视觉方向 and bounded private context input
前端设计执行包 in agent-prompt, checklist, and reference-pack modes
complete Simplified Chinese and original SKILL.md switch
relevance-ranked official sections with outline, search, and full-text reader
pinned supporting-file browser backed by BUNDLE.json hashes
runtime activity and controlled validation feedback
dedicatedElements: 前端视觉设计任务 input
产品、受众与视觉方向 panel
前端设计执行包 result view

tests.evidence: skill-frontend-design: original and complete Chinese bodies opened through skill_open; skill_prepare returned ranked sections, prompt, and checklist; outline/search remained available.
skill-frontend-design: the capability-specific profile objective and context ran in Chinese through skill_prepare and returned a non-empty task artifact.
skill-frontend-design: empty objectives, unknown fields/sections, invalid locale, traversal, and missing supporting assets were rejected with InvocationValidationError.

runner=playwright; browser=chromium; report=var/test-results/playwright.json; testIds=skills.spec.ts › priority Agent Skill browser workflows › @web-e2e [skill-frontend-design] runs bilingual task, source, asset, and failure workflows; route=/plugins/skill-frontend-design; result=passed
skill-frontend-design: source bundle hashes and containment were checked; the adapter only reads curated files and grants no network, commands, secrets, or accounts.

blockers: The shipped bilingual Web adaptation is verified; optional upstream scripts and downstream agent outcomes are outside this adapter and are not claimed as executed.
